Always goes to rot. Right on the side of the road. Access: Private.

[31240 SW Boones Ferry Rd] There are 8-12 mature apple trees of all varieties across the road from the parking lot in Boone's Ferry Park. Some old grafts bare red and yellow apples on same root stock. Could be some interesting genetics here. Access: Public.
